name: Ubiquiti Instant Indoor PoE Converter
title: Ubiquiti Instant Indoor PoE Converter
description: The Instant Indoor PoE (Power over Ethernet) Converter from Ubiquiti, identified by the manufacture part number INS-3AF-I-G, is a specialized device designed to convert Ubiquiti's non-PoE hardware to be compatible with PoE switches and networks. This technical product is particularly useful for integrating Ubiquiti devices into existing network infrastructures that utilize PoE capabilities, thereby simplifying the power and data cabling requirements. Compatible with airMAX® and UniFi® devices and offer a true plug-and-play experience. It can be connected immediately between any 802.3af-compatible switch and an Ubiquiti device requiring 24V passive PoE.

detailed_description.heading: Ubiquiti® Compatibility
detailed_description.text: The Instant Indoor PoE (Power over Ethernet) Converter from Ubiquiti, identified by the manufacture part number INS-3AF-I-G, is a specialized device designed to convert Ubiquiti's non-PoE hardware to be compatible with PoE switches and networks. This technical product is particularly useful for integrating Ubiquiti devices into existing network infrastructures that utilize PoE capabilities, thereby simplifying the power and data cabling requirements. Compatible with airMAX® and UniFi® devices and offer a true plug-and-play experience. It can be connected immediately between any 802.3af-compatible switch and an Ubiquiti device requiring 24V passive PoE.

detailed_description.heading: Longer Cable Runs
detailed_description.text: High voltage carries power more efficiently. The Instant 802.3af Gigabit PoE Converter enables longer cable runs due to a more efficient power delivery.

detailed_description.heading: ESD/Surge Protection
detailed_description.text: Instant 802.3af Converters provide an additional ±15kV of Ethernet isolation to lessen the risk of ESD or surge damage to connected devices.

detailed_description.heading: PoE Switch Compatibility
detailed_description.text: The Instant 802.3af Gigabit PoE Converter integrates seamlessly with a variety of auto-sensing 802.3af PoE switches for remote power control applications. As you manage and monitor your network, you can conveniently power or power cycle your remote devices using your 802.3af switch.
